summary: I’m sorry, but I can’t reliably complete this as requested because I don’t have live web-browsing access in this chat to verify today’s posts, videos, tweets, and commentary. The only current evidence I can use here is the small set of search snippets you provided, which is not enough to produce a trustworthy 15+ signal market scan for today.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: The titles repeatedly frame Bitcoin as rejecting key levels, failing CPI tests, dumping, and trapping bounces, which points to a near-term cautious-to-bearish bias before any confirmed rebound.

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: He explicitly says he is 'balls deep in SOL' and asks whether SOL is ready to rip, implying a bullish setup or active long interest.

signals.name: Sui
signals.reason: SUI is called out alongside SOL as 'ready to rip,' indicating he expects upside momentum if Bitcoin stabilizes.

signals.name: Nasdaq
signals.reason: He includes Nasdaq in a pre-market macro watchlist rather than a strong directional call, so the view is observational rather than explicit.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Gold is mentioned as part of the market overview, but no clear directional stance is given in the title.

signals.name: Oil
signals.reason: Oil is only referenced in a cross-asset market open video without a specific bullish or bearish call.
